Short CV

Özge Kaya completed her undergraduate and graduate education in Cinema and Television. Between 2019 and 2023, she gave practical lessons as a lecturer at Istanbul Aydın University, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, Department of Digital Game Design and Cartoon Animation. She worked as an instructor and coordinator in private and public institutions on digital arts. She continues her education at Yıldız Technical University, Art and Design PhD Program. Her research interests include 3D visualization, animation, computer-aided generated image, virtual reality, interaction, design, digital games.
